pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-6220" y="-4042.5" width="1120" height="562.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Inventory Crisis</b></span></font><br><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">Warehouse Checks:</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">&nbsp;5s --&gt; 30-45s</font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=6;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-6190" y="-3855" width="206.05" height="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="<div style="text-align: left;"><b style="font-size: 16px; font-family: Verdana; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Old Way:</b></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">1) Timeout After 10s</span></font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">2) Cancel Order</span></font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">3) Show 'Out of Stock' Errors</span></font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-5856.63" y="-4015" width="266.63" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="<div style="text-align: left;"><b style="font-size: 16px; font-family: Verdana; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Temporal Way:</b></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Timeout Protection + Heartbeats</span></font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-5853.92" y="-3745" width="303.92" height="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Heartbeat Monitoring</b></span></font><br><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">System sends 'I am still working' every few seconds during processing</span></font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-5850.58" y="-3620" width="240.58" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Timeout Limits</b></span></font><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Prevents infinite hanging but allow legitimate slow operations&nbsp;</span></font></div>"
